metadata.note: Sample question set for the public educational template. The full 50-question benchmark used to evaluate the production deployment is private. Replace these with questions anchored to your own indexed group.

questions.prompt: Where is the user-session composable in app-core? Return the exact file path.
Trace the import path from app-front-a's LoginButton component to the app-core useUserSession composable. How many hops?
List every dt-* token defined in app-core that app-front-a uses via uses_token edges.
Are there any duplicates_token edges between app-front-a and app-front-b that override a canonical dt-* token from app-core? Return the token names.
For node example-group/app-core:useUserSession, return its 1-hop inbound + outbound neighbors with their relations.
